@unittest.mock.patch('requests.Session.request') @unittest.mock.patch('pycamunda.base.from_isoformat', unittest.mock.MagicMock()) def test_create_calls_requests(mock, engine_url): create_deployment = pycamunda.deployment.Create(url=engine_url, name='aName', source='aSource') create_deployment.add_resource(file='NotARealFile') > create_deployment()
